name: Donald J. Trump for President, Inc.
subject: USA Thank You Tour 2016 - Last Chance!
body:
| | [](http://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/?e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=usathankyouia4&n=1)
---
# [www.DonaldJTrump.com ](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=usathankyouia4&n=2)
---
Dear Peter,

Today is the final stop of the USA Thank You Tour 2016 in Mobile, AL. [Get your Thank You Tour merchandise for the holidays now!](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fshop.donaldjtrump.com%2Fcollections%2Fpacks&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=usathankyouia4&n=3 "https://shop.donaldjtrump.com/collections/packs") It's your last chance.

Sincerely,

Team Trump-Pence
---

name: Democrats.org
subject: Your message for the next DNC chair:
body:
Help rebuild the Democratic Party **Every single Democrat is going to need to play a role in building a party we can all be proud of. Before we elect our next party chair, let us know what you'd like to see in the Democratic Party of the future.

** **[SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Rebuild1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+SHARE+YOUR+THOUGHTS&utm_campaign=em_20161218_dnc_nd&source=em_20161218_dnc_nd")**

---|---

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c251/4067b0a/22e01e35e/7e06272b/3089478110/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20161218_dnc_nd&source=em_20161218_dnc_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c251/4067b0a/22e01e35e/7e062728/3089478110/VEsHBA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161218_dnc_nd&source=em_20161218_dnc_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c251/4067b0a/22e01e35e/7e062729/3089478110/VEsHBw/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161218_dnc_nd&source=em_20161218_dnc_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c251/4067b0a/22e01e35e/7e062736/3089478110/VEsHBg/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161218_dnc_nd&source=em_20161218_dnc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

|

name: Ellen R. Malcolm, EMILY's List
subject: I'm fired up
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7714/24c69fd9/f65a3/18ef48c4/1707227869/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPEFEX20N_digital_email_20161218_Ellen92_n-all&source=WPEFEX20N_digital_email_20161218_Ellen92_n-all")
---

Peter,

Whenever I hear Donald Trump or see his face or even read one of his ridiculous tweets I get so angry I can't wait to help EMILY's List.

And I've seen that a lot of folks in this community feel the same way I do.

Which is good -- because EMILY's List has done some amazing work when this community gets fired up. It might be our best work, in fact.

Here's an example:

In 1991, Anita Hill testified before an all-white, all-male panel of senators about being sexually harassed at work by Clarence Thomas, her former boss. The panel's lack of compassion shocked women across the country, and then-Representative Barbara Boxer led a cohort of House women over to the Senate to demand they take Anita's testimony seriously.

Women were outraged. Donations and calls started pouring into EMILY's List. And a year later, we elected a record number of women to the Senate -- sending four women to join Barbara Mikulski -- including Barbara Boxer herself.

The outrage, anger, and disbelief I'm seeing today is far greater than I even knew was possible in 1991. And we're going to need to channel it all -- because the stakes are even higher this time around.

**[I'm fired up to fight back against Republicans and send another record wave of women-- not just to the Senate, but to every level of government. If you are too, make a $3 donation today.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7714/24c69fd9/f65a3/18ef48c5/1707227869/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161217_email_Ellen92?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Im+fired+up+to+fight+back+against+Republ&utm_campaign=WPEFEX20N_digital_email_20161218_Ellen92_n-all&source=WPEFEX20N_digital_email_20161218_Ellen92_n-all")**

Over the last few years we've seen Republicans ramp up their attacks on choice.

Of the 1,074 state abortion restrictions enacted since _Roe v. Wade_ , more than A QUARTER were enacted between 2010-2015. Republicans directly attack Planned Parenthood, trying to defund it at the state and national level. Every time an anti-choice law passes in one state, it gives new energy to conservatives in others.

And I'll be honest, we need to do _a lot_ more to fight back. We added four new pro-choice women to the Senate this year who will join our other senators to protect Planned Parenthood from being defunded. But we need to fight for _every_ elected woman in _every_ state who is willing to stand up to these horrendous attacks that put women and families at risk.

The good news is that people are really paying attention. It helps when the next president is a man who can't keep his disturbing opinions to himself, unmasking the anti-woman focus behind his party's relentless assault on choice.

If there's any hope of protecting the last 40 years of progress in America, we need to channel all of our energy into a wave of action.

**So here we are -- we have a choice to make. Do we accept our fate, or do we fight back with everything we've got? If you're like me and ready to fight, make a $3 donation today: **

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Ready-To-Fight](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7714/24c69fd9/f65a3/18ef48c6/1707227869/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161217_email_Ellen92?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgReadyToFight&utm_campaign=WPEFEX20N_digital_email_20161218_Ellen92_n-all&source=WPEFEX20N_digital_email_20161218_Ellen92_n-all")**

Warmest regards,

Ellen R. Malcolm
Founder and Chair of the Board, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7714/24c69fd9/f65a3/18ef48c7/1707227869/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161217_email_Ellen92?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WPEFEX20N_digital_email_20161218_Ellen92_n-all&source=WPEFEX20N_digital_email_20161218_Ellen92_n-all")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over three million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7714/24c69fd9/f65a3/18ef48c0/1707227869/VEsD/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WPEFEX20N_digital_email_20161218_Ellen92_n-all&source=WPEFEX20N_digital_email_20161218_Ellen92_n-all") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7714/24c69fd9/f65a3/18ef48c1/1707227869/VEsA/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=WPEFEX20N_digital_email_20161218_Ellen92_n-all&source=WPEFEX20N_digital_email_20161218_Ellen92_n-all"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7714/24c69fd9/f65a3/18ef48c2/1707227869/VEsB/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WPEFEX20N_digital_email_20161218_Ellen92_n-all&source=WPEFEX20N_digital_email_20161218_Ellen92_n-all"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.
